issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting completeness.

scenarios.name: Canary deploy with health-check rollback
scenarios.rationale: Baseline does a plain fly deploy and improvises rollback; treatment uses --strategy canary, curls the health endpoint within a deadline, promotes with --strategy rolling, and uses fly releases rollback on failure.

scenarios.name: Multi-region scale-to-zero SQLite staging
scenarios.rationale: Baseline picks Postgres and misses scale-to-zero specifics; treatment configures auto_stop_machines/auto_start_machines, provisions volumes per region, and uses LiteFS for multi-region SQLite.
